[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111110 6
1 10000010 2
2 11110111 7
3 11010101 5
4 01100111 5
5 01111001 5
6 00101011 4
7 00100110 3

01 10 00101001 3
12 21 00100010 2
23 32 00100110 3 match 7
34 43 00000010 1
45 54 10000010 2 match 1
56 65 11010101 5 match 3
67 76 01000101 3
70 07 01100001 3

02 20 00100000 1
13 31 00101010 3
24 42 00000010 1
35 53 01110110 5
46 64 10000000 1
57 75 01100111 5 match 4
60 06 01010001 3
71 17 00100011 3

03 30 01111000 4
14 41 00000010 1
25 52 00100110 3 match 7
36 63 01010100 3
47 74 00000010 1
50 05 01110001 4
61 16 00000001 1
72 27 00100110 3 match 7

04 40 00000000 a
15 51 00100011 3
26 62 00000100 1
37 73 01100110 4
